title: Leroy Override Stanza
description: Schema for a TOML override stanza used to configure Leroy maprule overrides.

Ticket-id.description: The JIRA ticket ID associated with this override request.

Start-time.description: Unix epoch timestamp for when the override takes effect.

End-time.description: Unix epoch timestamp for when the override expires.

Mapnames.description: List of maprule names or IDs this override applies to. Ignored by some LR-level directives.

Region-number.description: List of region numbers for the override.

Region-metro.description: List of metros for the override.

Region-country.description: List of country codes for the override.

Region-geo.description: List of geos for the override.

Region-default.description: Applies to all large regions. Value must be ["default"].

Access-control.description: Specifies access-control of maprules for large regions within the geographical scope.

Quota-multiplier.description: Multiply the disk requirement of the maprule(s) by this value.

Traffic-multiplier.description: Multiply the traffic of the maprule(s) by this value.

Quota-tb.description: Quota in TB for the maprule(s). Can be a single value or a list matching Mapnames.

Traffic-gbps.description: Traffic demand in Gbps for the maprule(s).

Quota-pct.description: Quota as a percentage of the large region's disk space (1-92%).

Object-count-quota-pct.description: Object count percentage for the maprule(s).

BLC-only.description: If true, the map is added only to BLC and not FCS.

FCS-only.description: If true, the map is added only to FCS and not BLC.

LR-available-servers.description: Set the number of available servers in the LR. Requires Region-number scope.

LR-available-server-multiplier.description: Multiply the disk available in the LR by this value. Requires Region-number scope.

LR-disk-capacity-tb.description: Set the disk space available in the LR in TB. Requires Region-number scope.

LR-effcap-gbps.description: Set the flitcap of the large region in Gbps.

LR-effcap-multiplier.description: Multiply the flitcap of the large region by this value.

Sticky-map-bonus-coefficient.description: Override the default sticky map bonus coefficients for the specified maprule(s).

Force-accept-disk-quota.description: If true, LeRoy accepts increased/decreased footprint requirements without reverting.

Force-accept-poor-quality-fd.description: If true, LeRoy ignores poor footprint descriptor quality for the specified maps.

LR-freeze-sticky-maps.description: If true, all sticky maps are assigned to the LR even if space is insufficient.

LR-Acknowledge-lost-region.description: If true, accepts that a missing region was decommissioned and stops publishing stale data.

LR-Accept-disk-capacity-drop.description: If true, accepts a large drop in region disk capacity and uses LeRoy's new solution.

LR-Accept-flitcap-drop.description: If true, accepts a large drop in region flitcap and uses LeRoy's new solution.
